zh.lifeSummary: 當John Chichester於1475年6月出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Nicholas Chichester29歲，母親Christiana Paulet27歲。他於大約1495年與Margaret Beaumont在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年2月22日在英國戴文布勞頓享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Chichester于1475年6月出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Nicholas Chichester29岁，母亲Christiana Paulet27岁。他于大约1495年与Margaret Beaumont在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年2月22日在英国戴文布勞頓享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chichester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Chichester in Sussex, probably named with the Old English personal name Cissa + Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort’. (Cissa is attested as the name of a historical person; it is of uncertain etymology.) Alternatively, the first element may be an Old English word cisse ‘gravelly feature’.

variants.name: Chidester
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Chichester  . It is not found in English records.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Chichester was born in June 1475, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Chichester, was 29 and his mother, Christiana Paulet, was 27. He married Margaret Beaumont about 1495, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 22 February 1538, in Braunton, Devon, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Chichester est né en juin 1475, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Chichester, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christiana Paulet, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Beaumont environ 1495, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 22 février 1538, à Braunton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Chichester im Juni 1475 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Chichester 29 und seine Mutter Christiana Paulet 27. Er hat um 1495 in Devon, England Margaret Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1538 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Braunton, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Chichester è nato il nel giugno 1475 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Chichester, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Paulet, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Beaumont circa 1495, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1538, nel Braunton, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Chichesterが1475年6月にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Chichesterは29歳，母Christiana Pauletは27歳であった。約1495年にイギリスデボンでMargaret Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年2月22日にイギリスデボンブラウントンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Chichester(이)가 1475년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Chichester(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Paulet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 2월 22일 영국 데폰 브라운턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Chichester nasceu em junho de 1475, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Chichester, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Paulet, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Beaumont aproximadamente 1495, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1538, em Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Chichester родился июнь 1475 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Chichester было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Paulet, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Beaumont около 1495 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 22 февраля 1538 г. в местности браунтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Chichester nació en junio de 1475, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Chichester, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Christiana Paulet, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Beaumont aproximadamente 1495, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1538, en Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
